ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location descriptor (e.g., Northwest, North) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the neighborhood */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the residents */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average number of people per household */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the racial distribution */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median household income */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the neighborhood */,
  "public_services" TEXT /* JSON object representing the availability of public services */,
  "public_transportation" TEXT /* JSON object representing public transportation options */,
  "parks" TEXT /* JSON object representing parks in the neighborhood */,
  "schools" TEXT /* JSON object representing schools in the neighborhood */,
  "council_representative" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the council representative */,
  "community_board" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the community board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, planner, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the users table */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the neighborhoods table */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object representing the permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
column_names: City where the neighborhood is located
State where the neighborhood is located
Average number of people per household
JSON object representing the racial distribution
JSON object representing the availability of public services
JSON object representing public transportation options
JSON object representing parks in the neighborhood
JSON object representing schools in the neighborhood
Name and contact information of the council representative
Name and contact information of the community board
Unique identifier for each access control entry
Foreign key linking to the users table
Foreign key linking to the neighborhoods table
